meta.title: Why America's massive defense budget just isn't enough
meta.description:
Go to https://ground.news/Sandboxx to stay fully informed on military developments around the world. Subscribe through my link right now for 40% off their Vantage Plan, which is what I use everyday.

– BREAK –

This might be the most politically controversial take I’ve ever shared on this platform: The United States needs a bigger Defense budget. 

I know you're angry... but hear me out.
